BUILD.bazel.content:
"""Per-tenant spec shards: manual-files-*.cue entries for hand-written
files owned by this tenant. Merged into kernel/spec/contracts at
load time via the tenant-spec overlay (AIDR-00138 D5.2)."""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file", "tagged_package")

exports_files(glob(["*.cue"]))

# Consumed by kernel/spec's contracts_vet and friends so the Bazel
# sandbox has visibility into this tenant's spec shards.
filegroup(
    name = "spec_files",
    srcs = glob(["*.cue"]),
    visibility = ["//kernel/spec:__pkg__"],
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = ["bazel-build"],
)

tagged_package(exclude = ["BUILD.bazel"])
